prediction.reasoning: This prediction is generated based on a statistical model, assuming historical price behavior and market dynamics. For the point estimate, a slight positive drift (approximating an 8% annualized return) was applied to the current price of $515.93 over the 18-day period. For the confidence intervals, an estimated annualized volatility of 20% for TMO was used. This volatility was scaled to the 18-day period (using the square root of time rule) and then applied to the point estimate using standard Z-scores for each confidence level (50%, 80%, 90%) assuming a log-normal distribution for prices. This model does not incorporate real-time news, market sentiment, specific company events, or complex technical/fundamental analysis, and should not be considered financial advice. Stock prices are inherently unpredictable, and actual future prices may fall outside these ranges.
